title: saasaloy.json — consumer manifest
description: Alias map + installed-module list that lives at a generated project's root. Resolves module file targets and drives dependsOn resolution (build spec §3.2).

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor validation.

aliases.description: Alias → path-prefix map. Keys are `@`-prefixed aliases (e.g. `@api`); values are project-relative directories a module's file targets resolve against.

additionalProperties.description: Project-relative path prefix (POSIX separators, no leading slash).

installed.description: Modules present in this project. Grows as `saasaloy add` runs; drives dependsOn resolution.
